puzzle.title: The Guardian by the River's Edge
puzzle.intro: In a land where a tyrant's decree brought sorrow to many homes, a soul received a message that defied all fear. With a heart filled with trust, they embarked on an act of faith that would change the course of a nation. As the waters carried a precious cargo, hope mingled with the currents.
clues: I lived in a time of oppression and fear.
I received divine inspiration that gave me courage.
I was commanded not to fear or grieve.
I placed my child in a chest and set it upon the water.
My child was found by the household of the ruler, but my other child followed.
I was reunited with my child to nurse him, just as Allah promised.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Being inspired to cast a child into a river
Being challenged to a duel of magic
trial.answer: Being inspired to cast a child into a river

location.label: Key Element
options: A chest placed in the river
A staff that turned into a snake
location.answer: A chest placed in the river

outcome.label: Outcome
options: The child was safely returned to nurse
The child was taken to a faraway land
The child became a ruler immediately
The child was adopted by a wealthy merchant
outcome.answer: The child was safely returned to nurse

puzzle.arabic: وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَرْضِعِيهِ ۖ فَإِذَا خِفْتِ عَلَيْهِ فَأَلْقِيهِ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَلَا تَخَافِى وَلَا تَحْزَنِىٓ ۖ إِنَّا رَآدُّوهُ إِلَيْكِ وَجَاعِلُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
puzzle.verse: And We inspired to the mother of Moses, "Suckle him; but when you fear for him, cast him into the river and do not fear and do not grieve. Indeed, We will return him to you and will make him [one] of the messengers." (28:7)
